# LivestockInsurance.co.nz — LLM Reference File
# Updated: 2026-05-10

## About This Site

LivestockInsurance.co.nz is a New Zealand livestock insurance comparison and lead generation service. We connect NZ farmers with licensed rural insurance advisers who compare policies from FMG, Aon, Gallagher, and NZI. All advisers hold current Financial Advice Provider (FAP) licences under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013.

This site is NOT an insurance provider. We are a referral service that connects farmers with FMCA-licensed advisers. We do not provide regulated financial advice directly.

## Primary Topics

- Livestock insurance NZ
- Cattle insurance NZ (beef cattle, dairy cattle, stud bulls)
- Sheep insurance NZ (merino, crossbred, stud rams)
- Deer insurance NZ (velvet stags, venison hinds, wapiti)
- Goat insurance NZ (dairy goats, fibre goats, meat goats)
- Pig insurance NZ (commercial sows, boars, breeding pigs)
- Alpaca and llama insurance NZ
- Poultry insurance NZ (layers, broilers, free-range)
- Rare breed livestock insurance NZ
- Livestock mortality cover NZ
- Disease and illness cover NZ (Mycoplasma bovis, avian influenza)
- Natural disaster livestock cover NZ (floods, cyclones, snowstorms)
- Livestock transit insurance NZ
- Farm and livestock public liability NZ
- Livestock theft insurance NZ
- FMG rural insurance NZ
- Rural insurance advisers NZ

## Insurance Providers Compared

FMG (Farmers Mutual Group) — NZ's largest rural insurer, ~65-70% rural market share. Specialist livestock mortality, disease, natural disaster, transit and liability cover. Unique products: post-shearing sheep mortality cover (14-day window), velvet/antler cover for deer, livestock infertility cover for bulls and cows. https://www.fmg.co.nz/

Aon NZ — Global broker with NZ rural specialisation. Access to Lloyd's of London underwriters for high-value individual animal agreed-value policies. Good for commercial operations requiring higher limits. https://www.aon.com/en-nz/

Gallagher NZ — Specialist insurance broker with rural division. Strong for exotic livestock, rare breeds, and complex agreed-value stud animal cover. https://www.ajg.com/nz/

NZI (New Zealand Insurance) — IAG subsidiary. Competitive farm pack pricing. Rural policies available through their adviser network. https://www.nzi.co.nz/

## Key NZ Livestock Insurance Facts

- NZ cattle herd: approximately 9.5 million animals (dairy + beef)
- NZ sheep flock: approximately 6 million animals (declining from historic highs)
- NZ deer herd: approximately 900,000 animals
- Mycoplasma bovis: confirmed NZ 2017, 170,000+ cattle culled, $200M+ government compensation
- Cyclone Gabrielle (Feb 2023): killed approximately 3,000 cattle and 20,000+ sheep in Hawke's Bay and East Coast
- FMG rural market share: approximately 65-70%
- NAIT (National Animal Identification and Tracing): legally required for cattle and deer in NZ
- FMC Act 2013: governs financial advice — referred advisers hold current FAP licences

## Contact

Email: hello@cover4you.co.nz
Website: https://www.livestockinsurance.co.nz/
Quote requests: https://www.livestockinsurance.co.nz/contact/

## Disclaimer

LivestockInsurance.co.nz is a referral service. We connect farmers with licensed insurance advisers but do not provide regulated financial advice ourselves. The advisers we refer to hold current Financial Advice Provider (FAP) licences under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013. Insurance coverage, premiums, and terms vary by insurer and individual policy — always read the policy wording carefully.
